rows.label: xs33120100_MSG0010
rows.name: What is the meaning of this[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33120100_MSG0020
rows.name: Have we been swallowed by the void[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33120100_MSG0030
rows.name: I can see a light straight ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33120100_MSG0040
rows.name: Are they trying to invite us in?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33120100_MSG0070
rows.name:
It seems the bottom of
the ship hit something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33120100_MSG0090
rows.name: There doesn't seem to be any, yo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33120100_MSG0100
rows.name: What is the situation of our surroundings?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33120100_MSG0110
rows.name:
We might be experiencing radio interference. We
cannot determine the surrounding situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33120100_MSG0120
rows.name: It's dangerous to proceed like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33120100_MSG0140
rows.name:
The hull might be torn to pieces
before we even reach the light ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33120100_MSG0150
rows.name: This ship will stand by here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33120100_MSG0160
rows.name:
Defense units, guard the
perimeter of the ship.[ST:wait ]
